description_long: This rifle features a robust, dark metallic body with a prominent, multi-barreled front section reminiscent of a Gatling or rotary gun. The stock is solid and angular, constructed from a material that appears to mimic wood, providing a sturdy shoulder rest. The receiver and magazine area are accented with bright red and green highlights, giving the weapon a modern, almost cyberpunk aesthetic. The magazine is curved and detachable, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The barrel assembly is long and reinforced, with visible rings and a possible muzzle device at the tip. The overall design suggests a heavy, high-capacity firearm intended for sustained fire in urban combat scenarios.
description: A heavy, multi-barreled rifle with a solid wood-like stock, curved detachable magazine, and striking red and green accents.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the circular arrangement of the multi-barrel assembly and a glimpse of the stock and magazine behind.
description_view_1: A full side profile reveals the long, reinforced barrel, angular stock, curved magazine, and colorful wiring or accents along the receiver.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the broad, textured stock and the alignment of the barrels, with the magazine and trigger area partially visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile mirrors view 1, showing the same key features with slight differences in the visibility of the wiring and magazine.
